headline: Want $4,350 in Passive Income? Invest $75,000 Into These 3 Dividend Aristocrat Stocks
summary: Market volatility has rattled portfolios in 2026, with broad indexes pulling back as slowing growth weigh on sentiment. When earned income feels fragile and savings accounts barely keep pace with inflation, dividend income becomes essential. A portfolio that pays you every quarter regardless of headlines is a foundation. High-yield dividend stocks offer liquidity that real ... Want $4,350 in Passive Income? Invest $75,000 Into These 3 Dividend Aristocrat Stocks

headline: T. Rowe Price Expands Fixed Income Platform Through CLO Launch
summary: TROW enters the CLO market with a $403.6M issuance, aiming to expand fixed income offerings and tap higher-income credit opportunities.

headline: LiveOak Fiber Secures New Funding to Accelerate Fiber Expansion
summary: LiveOak Fiber, a high-growth fiber-to-the-home internet provider, today announced it has secured a $425 million credit facility from Oak Hill Advisors ("OHA") and Palistar Capital to support continued network expansion across the Southeast region. The new capital will help LiveOak Fiber shape its vision for the future, extending its all-fiber footprint and accelerating internet connectivity across the company's existing and planned markets. headline: Bank of America Cuts T. Rowe (TROW) Price Target, Sees “Challenging” Start to 2026
summary: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TROW) is included among the 15 Blue Chip Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 5, Bank of America lowered its price recommendation on T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TROW) to $73 from $83. It reiterated an Underperform rating on the shares. The firm cut targets across the asset managers group […]
